creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #17)

For convenience

<https://reviews.freebsd.org/P575> | <https://reviews.freebsd.org/paste/raw/575/> is copied from a wide terminal view of 

man -P more /usr/src/share/man/man7/hier.7

– with the first and last lines narrowed. 

No hard wrapping.
